creator: georg.lastname@web.de
text:
Created attachment 218926
shar file according to the porters handbook.

Update to version 1.38.

I think the code quality is improving.

Maybe the name should change.
There seems to be a smartphone app now which is called xdisk. Also, xdisk runs in wayland, so the reference to X11 is obsolete.

Using polkit might be preferred over sudo. But not every window manager uses polkit..

Thanks. ;-)
